get.description: Returns a simple greeting confirming the auth service is reachable.

503.description: The Health Check is not successful

get.description: Returns service health and dependency status. Use for load balancer probes and deployment verification.

Returns the authenticated user, the synthesized session (derived purely from the JWT), the active organization role, RBAC claims, and the capability summary. Used by the SPA on every cold load to populate the auth store and the route capability gate.
get.summary: Hydrate the SPA from the verified JWT (replaces /api/v1/validate-session)

patch.description: Partially updates name, firstName, lastName, phoneNumber, jobTitle, and image (HTTPS URL or fluide-file: reference).

post.description: Creates the user (password is hashed, email kept un-verified) and dispatches an email OTP. No JWT is returned — the user must verify their email via POST /api/v1/auth/email-otp/verify, which is the path that mints a credential.
post.summary: Create a user + send verification OTP

post.description: On success returns `{ user, accessToken: { accessToken, jti, iat, exp, tenantId, fluideClientId } }`. The SPA stores `accessToken.accessToken` in localStorage.
post.summary: Verify email + password and mint an access JWT

post.description: Call after POST /auth/sign-in returned `{ twoFactorRequired: true, pendingToken }`. Mints the same RS256 access JWT shape as a normal sign-in.
post.summary: Complete password sign-in after TOTP second step (Option C JWT only)

post.description: Re-authenticates with password, returns a TOTP secret + otpauth URI. Requires `auth:mfa:enroll` when JWT carries a permissions list.
post.summary: Begin MFA (TOTP) enrollment for the authenticated user
Confirm MFA enrollment with a valid TOTP code
Send a one-time code to the user via email

post.description: Flips `emailVerified=true`, ensures the default organization exists, then mints an access JWT bound to the supplied `fluideClientId`.
post.summary: Verify post-signup email OTP and mint the first JWT
Passwordless sign-in via emailed OTP
Send a password reset email with a one-time link

post.description: Bumps `user.roleRevision` so any in-flight JWT for this user is invalidated by the gateway on the very next request — defence-in-depth alongside the per-jti denylist.
post.summary: Reset password with a one-time token and bump app_perm_ver

post.description: Does not mint a JWT. After success the user signs in with email + password. Rate-limited per client IP.
post.summary: Complete HR staff first-access setup (single-use token + initial password)

post.description: After this call the same JWT cannot be presented again — the gateway and FluideAuth refuse it with `TOKEN_REVOKED`. The SPA also clears its localStorage entry.
post.summary: Revoke the current JWT (jti goes onto the Redis denylist)
Start an OAuth flow and return the provider URL the browser should visit

get.summary: OAuth provider callback — exchanges code, mints our JWT, redirects to SPA

post.summary: Start OIDC SSO and return the IdP authorization URL

get.summary: OIDC redirect URI — exchanges code, mints Fluide JWT, redirects to SPA with fragment
Published JWKS — RSA public keys used to verify access JWTs
List organizations the caller belongs to

post.summary: Create an organization, make caller `owner`, mint a new JWT bound to it
Switch active organization. Revokes current JWT, returns new one.

get.summary: Active organization profile (FBI id, plan, kind, business profile, owner/admin emails). Requires org settings / structure / members permission in JWT.

patch.summary: Patch active organization locale and timezone preferences

get.summary: Organization security posture (MFA, session timeout, IP allowlist)

patch.summary: Patch organization security posture for partner firm consoles

get.summary: List members of an organization (caller must be a member)

post.summary: Deactivate an organization member (owner/admin only; cannot remove last owner)
Invite a teammate (owner/admin only)

get.summary: List pending invitations for an organization (owner/admin only)

post.summary: Bulk-invite teammates during onboarding. BUSINESS orgs ensure an HR employee per email.
Attach a fluide-hr canonical employee id to the latest pending invite for an email
Accept an invitation as the currently signed-in user. Mints a new JWT bound to the org and revokes the old one.

delete.summary: Cancel a pending invitation (owner/admin of the inviting org only)

get.summary: Public invitation metadata (used by the invitee landing page before sign-in)

post.description: Used by /join/:invitationId. Refuses if a credential account already exists for the invite email — in that case the user must POST /api/v1/auth/sign-in followed by POST /api/v1/organizations/invitations/:invitationId/accept.
post.summary: Single-step claim flow: create the user, accept the invite, and mint a JWT bound to the org
Submit/replace KYB-KYC documents for super-admin review

get.summary: Get current KYB status and level for active organization

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Defaults to the current company country when omitted.

get.summary: Get required and allowed KYB document types for country/tier/applicant profile

parameters.name: structureType
parameters.description: Optional; echoed as requestedStructureType. Full payload is always returned.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: When set, response includes `companyBranchLocations`: `location` nodes for that company (must belong to the org).

get.summary: Business oversight — delegated VM actions and engagement lifecycle

info.title: Fluide Auth API
info.description: Identity, developer credentials, token exchange, organizations, and RBAC for the Fluide Suite. Use this API to obtain JWTs before calling product services through the gateway.

tags.name: App
tags.description: Service root and build metadata. Use for quick connectivity checks.

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Liveness and readiness probes. Returns dependency status (database, Redis, etc.) for orchestrators and uptime monitors.

pendingToken.description: Opaque token from POST /auth/sign-in when twoFactorRequired is true.

trustDeviceLabel.description: Optional display name for audit logs.

providerId.description: SSO provider id (matches `ssoProvider.providerId`). Use this or `domain` or `email`.

domain.description: Email domain to resolve a registered SSO provider. Alternative to `providerId`.

email.description: Email address whose domain resolves the SSO provider. Alternative to `providerId`.

loginHint.description: Forwarded to the IdP as login_hint when supported.

slug.description: Optional slug — derived from `name` when omitted (lowercase, dash-separated).

locale.description: BCP 47 locale (en | fr supported in admin)

requireMfaForOperators.description: Require MFA for partner operators on delegated engagements

ipAllowlist.description: Optional CIDR/IP allowlist entries for firm admin consoles

resend.description: Resend if a pending invite already exists for the email.

fluideClientId.description: First-party SPA the invitee is claiming the invite on behalf of.

roles.description: Organization role names used in company setup.

frequency.description: Payroll frequency used as default for company employees.

days.description: Payday(s) in month/week depending on frequency.

bankName.description: Bank name used for payroll source account.

branch.description: Branch name/code when method is manual.

accountNumber.description: Bank account number used as payroll source account.

connected.description: Whether bank connection is currently verified/connected.

walletNumber.description: Wallet number used for payroll fallback payouts.

financeOfficer.description: Finance Officer signature identifier or URL.

allowances.description: Allowance codes/names for this payroll group.

deductions.description: Deduction codes/names (e.g. CRTV, CNPS, NHS, PAYE) for this payroll group.

grossPayMode.description: How gross pay should be interpreted.

pattern.description: Format/pattern used for generated employee numbers.

currency.description: Primary company currency using ISO 4217 code.

bankConnection.description: Bank account details used for payroll funding.

signatures.description: Signature assets for approvals and generated documents.

payrollSetup.description: Payroll setup details including groups, allowances and deductions.

suspendedUntil.description: ISO8601 end of suspension; null clears suspension.

organizationNameConfirm.description: Must match the organization legal name exactly (trimmed).

companyNameConfirm.description: Must match the company legal name exactly (trimmed).

currency.description: Primary company currency using ISO 4217 code.

signatures.description: Signature assets for approvals and generated documents.

payrollSetup.description: Payroll setup details including groups, allowances and deductions.

legalAttestations.description: Legal attestations stored on the company row (subsidiary wizard).

kybSubmitted.description: True once the wizard has dispatched the KYB submission to the review queue.

stepCompleted.description: User finished the business registration onboarding step.

deferredDocumentUpload.description: User will upload KYB documents from the dashboard instead of now.

skipped.description: User chose “skip for now” on legal & compliance step.

selectedPlan.description: Plan slug stored on organization.plan (e.g. startup, essential, growth, enterprise).

skipped.description: User chose “skip for later” on billing step.

organizationStructure.description: Organization-wide department names and role labels (merged into setupData).

wizardStepCursor.description: Optional UI cursor for resume across wizard steps.

employmentOnboardingMode.description: HR_FIRST: create HR employee then optional invite. INVITE_FIRST: store HR draft then invite; HR row created when user accepts.

targetStage.description: Target onboarding stage for the active organization. Response returns updated status when transition succeeds.

note.description: Optional operator note for stage transition audit logs.

type.description: Normalized document type key agreed with frontend and reviewer panel.

url.description: Uploaded file URL (typically from file service/object storage). Required when fileId is not provided.

fileId.description: Optional file id from shared file service (`/api/v1/app/files`). When provided, KYB stores generated download URL automatically.

metadata.description: Optional free-form metadata (issuer, reference number, etc.).

applicantType.description: Submission profile. COMPANY is default for org KYB; partner values are for referral/service partner KYC-KYB.

tier.description: Verification tier. For partner profiles this is still required for scoring/policy alignment, even when requirement sets are role-specific.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Defaults to current company.countryCode when omitted.

documents.description: Uploaded documents. Use document keys that match the selected applicantType requirement set.

description.description: Shown in ESO UIs; stored on cohort.metadata.description

businessOrganizationId.description: Business organization id (kind = BUSINESS) — Fluide Business ID (FBI) for tenants already on Fluide.

invitedEmail.description: Invite by email when the business is not on Fluide yet; queues a join link to fluide-admin.

businessCompanyId.description: Optional company id under the business.

scopeHr.description: HR module scope (defaults from operations when omitted).

scopePayroll.description: Payroll module scope (defaults from operations when omitted).

scopeAccounting.description: Accounting / books scope (defaults from financials when omitted).

token.description: Opaque token from the cohort invite email link.
Opaque token from the cohort invite email link.

businessCompanyId.description: Optional company id under the business.
